inventory_reconciliation.p3_pothos: Present: Single leaf remains, healthy turgor.

plant_audit.p1: Bare soil, no signs of life.
plant_audit.p2: Bare soil, no signs of life.
plant_audit.p3: One healthy, dark green leaf with white rabbit anchor. Stable.
plant_audit.p4: One thin, green stem/sprout. Appears to be the primary occupant.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Dark, appears moist/damp across all pots.
biome_observations.surface_debris: Eggshell fragments present in P4, indicating potential calcium supplementation or soil amendment.
biome_observations.desk_surface: Clean, no significant fungal growth or external debris.

temporal_deltas.t2_to_t1: Lighting anomaly (low light/underexposure), no structural change.
temporal_deltas.t1_to_current: Return to baseline lighting; P4 stem remains consistent in position.

visual_health_inference.p3: High health; leaf is turgid and well-pigmented.
visual_health_inference.p4: Moderate health; growth is minimal but stable.

anomalies: P1 and P2 are currently devoid of visible plant matter.
vision_report.narrative_description: The biome is currently in a state of arrested development. P3 (Pothos) remains the most robust specimen, anchored by the rabbit figurine. P4 shows a singular, delicate stem. P1 and P2 are currently empty, suggesting either dormancy or total loss of the original specimens. The environment is stable, with consistent moisture levels and no signs of external pathogens or pests.
